title: justicia lineata
intro: Justicia lineata, also known as the lined Justicia or water willow, is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia lineata are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's bioactive compounds using a solvent.
